# Chief-of-Staff: Canonical state.json Schema

> **Authority**: This is the single source of truth for the `state.json` schema.
> All other specs (architecture, commands, hooks-session) reference this file
> rather than redefining the schema.

---

## 1. Schema Definition

```jsonc
{
  // ── Identity ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Session ID comes from Claude Code's native session_id (delivered
  // via hook stdin). Never generated by COS.
  "session_id": "string",

  // ISO 8601 timestamps
  "created_at": "2026-03-17T14:30:00Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-03-17T15:45:00Z",

  // ── Environment ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Detected once at session init by init.sh. Never changes mid-session.
  "vcs_type": "jj | git",

  // Plugins detected at init. Used for routing decisions (e.g., delegate
  // to /cycle:pr only if cycle is installed).
  "installed_plugins": ["cycle", "ralph-wiggum", "next-level"],

  // ── Session Status ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // SCREAMING_CASE enum. See Section 3 for state machine.
  "status": "PLANNING | DISPATCHING | MONITORING | CHECKPOINTING | COMPLETE",

  // ── Work Items ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Array of objects. Each work item is a discrete unit of work parsed
  // from the user's input. This is the most detailed representation —
  // includes issue/PR references, workspace info, branch, and errors.
  "work_items": [
    {
      "id": "item-1",
      "description": "implement #18",
      "type": "implement | research | review | port | spec",

      // GitHub references (null if not from an issue/PR)
      "issue": 18,
      "pr_number": null,

      // Wave assignment and dependencies
      "wave": 1,
      "depends_on": ["item-2"],

      // Agent assignment (null until dispatched)
      "agent_id": null,

      // Workspace info (null for research/review agents)
      "workspace": "~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/item-1",
      "workspace_type": "jj | git-worktree | none",
      "branch": "cos/18-add-rate-limiting",

      // Work item status — lowercase enum. See Section 4.
      "status": "pending",

      // Lifecycle timestamps
      "started_at": null,
      "completed_at": null,

      // Outcome
      "result_summary": null,
      "error": null
    }
  ],

  // ── Waves ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Array of objects with a `number` field. Ordered by wave number.
  // Each wave groups independent work items for parallel dispatch.
  "waves": [
    {
      "number": 1,
      "status": "pending | active | complete | failed",
      "items": ["item-1", "item-3"],
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:31:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T14:45:00Z"
    }
  ],

  // ── Agents ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Object keyed by agent-id. Each entry tracks a dispatched background
  // agent. The agent-id is assigned at dispatch time.
  "agents": {
    "agent-research-001": {
      "name": "explore-auth-module",
      "type": "research | implement | review",
      "status": "running | complete | failed",
      "work_item_id": "item-1",
      "workspace_path": null,
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:31:00Z",
      "completed_at": null
    }
  },

  // ── Quality Gates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Detected project quality tooling. Populated at session init or on
  // first /cos:implement dispatch.
  "quality_gates": {
    "conventions_loaded": false,
    "formatters": ["ruff", "prettier"],
    "linters": ["ruff", "eslint"],
    "test_command": "cargo test",
    "build_command": "cargo build",
    "lint_command": "cargo clippy"
  },

  // ── Context Tracking ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Tracks context window usage for automatic checkpointing.
  "context": {
    "percentage": 42,
    "last_checked": "2026-03-17T15:00:00Z",
    "checkpoints": ["2026-03-17T15:00:00Z"]
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Field Reference

### Top-Level Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `session_id` | string | yes | -- | Claude Code's native session ID from hook stdin. Used for directory naming: `~/.chief-of-staff/sessions/{session_id}/`. |
| `created_at` | ISO 8601 | yes | -- | Timestamp of session creation. |
| `updated_at` | ISO 8601 | yes | -- | Timestamp of last state mutation. Updated on every write. |
| `vcs_type` | enum | yes | `"git"` | `"jj"` or `"git"`. Detected at session init. Determines isolation strategy. |
| `installed_plugins` | string[] | yes | `[]` | Plugins detected at init (e.g., `["cycle", "ralph-wiggum", "next-level"]`). |
| `status` | enum | yes | `"PLANNING"` | Session-level status. See Section 3. |
| `work_items` | array | yes | `[]` | Discrete units of work. See below. |
| `waves` | array | yes | `[]` | Wave groupings. See below. |
| `agents` | object | yes | `{}` | Map of agent-id to agent state. See below. |
| `quality_gates` | object | yes | `{}` | Detected quality tooling. See below. |
| `context` | object | yes | -- | Context window tracking. See below. |

### Work Item Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | string | yes | -- | Unique identifier (e.g., `"item-1"`). |
| `description` | string | yes | -- | Human-readable task description. |
| `type` | enum | yes | -- | `"implement"`, `"research"`, `"review"`, `"port"`, or `"spec"`. |
| `issue` | number\|null | no | `null` | GitHub issue number, if applicable. |
| `pr_number` | number\|null | no | `null` | GitHub PR number, set after PR creation. |
| `wave` | number | yes | -- | Wave number this item belongs to. |
| `depends_on` | string[] | yes | `[]` | IDs of work items this item depends on. |
| `agent_id` | string\|null | no | `null` | ID of the assigned agent, set at dispatch. |
| `workspace` | string\|null | no | `null` | Absolute path to isolated workspace. Null for read-only agents. |
| `workspace_type` | enum\|null | no | `null` | `"jj"`, `"git-worktree"`, or `"none"`. |
| `branch` | string\|null | no | `null` | Git/JJ branch name for the work. |
| `status` | enum | yes | `"pending"` | Work item status. See Section 4. |
| `started_at` | ISO 8601\|null | no | `null` | Timestamp when agent was dispatched. |
| `completed_at` | ISO 8601\|null | no | `null` | Timestamp when work completed or failed. |
| `result_summary` | string\|null | no | `null` | Brief summary of agent output (max 300 chars). |
| `error` | string\|null | no | `null` | Error message if failed. |

### Wave Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `number` | number | yes | -- | Wave number (1-indexed). |
| `status` | enum | yes | `"pending"` | `"pending"`, `"active"`, `"complete"`, or `"failed"`. |
| `items` | string[] | yes | `[]` | Work item IDs in this wave. |
| `started_at` | ISO 8601\|null | no | `null` | When the wave was dispatched. |
| `completed_at` | ISO 8601\|null | no | `null` | When all items in the wave finished. |

### Agent Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | string | yes | -- | Descriptive agent name (e.g., `"explore-auth-module"`). |
| `type` | enum | yes | -- | `"research"`, `"implement"`, or `"review"`. |
| `status` | enum | yes | -- | `"running"`, `"complete"`, or `"failed"`. |
| `work_item_id` | string | yes | -- | ID of the work item this agent is executing. |
| `workspace_path` | string\|null | no | `null` | Path to isolated workspace (null for read-only agents). |
| `started_at` | ISO 8601 | yes | -- | When the agent was dispatched. |
| `completed_at` | ISO 8601\|null | no | `null` | When the agent returned. |

### Quality Gates Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `conventions_loaded` | boolean | no | `false` | Whether CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md conventions were detected. |
| `formatters` | string[] | no | `[]` | Detected formatters (e.g., `["ruff", "prettier"]`). |
| `linters` | string[] | no | `[]` | Detected linters (e.g., `["eslint"]`). |
| `test_command` | string\|null | no | `null` | Detected test command (e.g., `"npm test"`). |
| `build_command` | string\|null | no | `null` | Detected build command. |
| `lint_command` | string\|null | no | `null` | Detected lint command. |

### Context Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `percentage` | number | yes | `0` | Estimated context window usage (0-100). |
| `last_checked` | ISO 8601 | yes | -- | When percentage was last updated. |
| `checkpoints` | ISO 8601[] | yes | `[]` | Timestamps of each checkpoint taken. |

---

## 3. Session Status Enum

Session status uses SCREAMING_CASE to distinguish it clearly from work-item
status (which uses lowercase).

| Status | Description | Entry conditions |
|--------|-------------|-----------------|
| `PLANNING` | Orchestrator is parsing input, building dependency graph, grouping waves. | Session created; or resumed with pending work. |
| `DISPATCHING` | Agents are being launched for the current wave. | Wave plan finalized; or previous wave completed. |
| `MONITORING` | All agents in the current wave are running. Orchestrator is waiting for completions. | All agents in wave dispatched. |
| `CHECKPOINTING` | Saving state to disk. Transient state entered during PreCompact or Stop hooks. | PreCompact or Stop hook fires. |
| `COMPLETE` | All waves finished, results synthesized. Terminal state. | Last wave completed. |

### Session State Transitions

```
PLANNING ──> DISPATCHING ──> MONITORING ──> DISPATCHING (next wave)
    |              |              |               |
    |              |              |               v
    |              |              |          MONITORING ...
    |              |              |               |
    |              v              v               v
    +-------> CHECKPOINTING <----+----------+----+
                   |
                   v
              (resume) ──> previous state or PLANNING

Any state ──────> COMPLETE (when last wave finishes)
```

- CHECKPOINTING is entered from any active state when PreCompact or Stop fires.
- On resume after compaction, the session returns to the state it was in before
  checkpointing (or to PLANNING if state is ambiguous).

---

## 4. Work Item Status Enum

Work item status uses lowercase to distinguish it from session status.

| Status | Description | Next states |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| `pending` | Queued, waiting for its wave or dependencies. | `dispatched` |
| `dispatched` | Agent has been launched, work is in progress. | `complete`, `failed` |
| `complete` | Agent finished successfully. For implement items, this means quality gates passed and PR was created/merged. | (terminal) |
| `failed` | Agent failed, quality gates failed, or unrecoverable error. | `dispatched` (on retry) |

### Retry Policy

- Maximum 2 retries (3 total attempts) per work item.
- On failure, the orchestrator may re-dispatch the same work item by setting
  its status back to `dispatched` with a new `agent_id`.
- After 3 total attempts, the item stays `failed` and the orchestrator
  escalates to the user.
- Retry count is tracked via the number of agents in the `agents` map that
  reference the same `work_item_id`.

### Work Item State Transitions

```
pending ──> dispatched ──> complete
                |
                v
             failed ──> dispatched (retry, max 2 retries)
                |
                v
             failed (permanent, after 3 total attempts)
```

---

## 5. Wave Status Enum

| Status | Description | Next states |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| `pending` | Wave is planned but not yet dispatched. | `active` |
| `active` | Agents in this wave are running. | `complete`, `failed` |
| `complete` | All items in this wave finished (some may have failed). | (terminal) |
| `failed` | ALL items in this wave failed. Blocks subsequent waves. | (terminal) |

### Wave State Transitions

```
pending ──> active ──> complete
                |
                v
             failed (only if ALL items fail)
```

A wave transitions to `complete` even if some items failed, as long as at
least one item succeeded. This allows downstream waves to proceed (with
caveats about missing dependencies). A wave transitions to `failed` only if
every item in it failed.

---

## 6. Agent Status Enum

| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `running` | Agent is executing in the background. |
| `complete` | Agent returned successfully. |
| `failed` | Agent returned with an error or was killed. |

---

## 7. Configuration Defaults

These defaults are used when `~/.chief-of-staff/config.json` is missing.
The config file can override any of them.

| Setting | Default | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| `max_parallel_agents` | 4 | Maximum agents per wave (backpressure cap). |
| `checkpoint_threshold` | 80 | Context percentage that triggers auto-checkpoint. |
| `default_isolation` | `"worktree"` | Default isolation strategy. |
| `quality_gate_mode` | `"strict"` | `strict`, `lenient`, or `disabled`. |
| `merge_strategy` | `"merge-as-you-go"` | `merge-as-you-go` or `batch`. |
| `auto_pr` | `true` | Auto-create PR on implementation completion. |

---

## 8. Workspace Path Convention

All agent workspaces are created under `~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/`.
This centralizes workspaces in a known location regardless of project directory.

| Context | Path pattern |
|---------|-------------|
| Single implement item | `~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/item-{id}` |
| Wave dispatch | `~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/wave-{wave}-item-{id}` |
| Cleanup | `rm -rf ~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/wave-*` or per-item |

For JJ, workspaces are created with:

```bash
jj workspace add ~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/item-{id}
```

For git, workspaces are created with:

```bash
git worktree add ~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/item-{id} -b cos/{branch-name}
```

---

## 9. Directory Structure

```
~/.chief-of-staff/
  config.json                           # Global configuration (optional)
  sessions/
    {session-id}/                       # session-id = Claude Code native ID
      state.json                        # Live session state (this schema)
      checkpoint.json                   # Snapshot (written at PreCompact/Stop)
      agents/
        {agent-id}.json                 # Per-agent detailed state
  workspaces/                           # Isolated agent workspaces
    item-1/                             # JJ workspace or git worktree
    wave-2-item-3/
```

---

## 10. Example: Running Session

A session with 4 work items across 2 waves. Wave 1 is complete, wave 2 is
in progress with one agent running and one complete.

```json
{
  "session_id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
  "created_at": "2026-03-17T14:30:00Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-03-17T15:12:00Z",
  "vcs_type": "jj",
  "installed_plugins": ["cycle", "ralph-wiggum", "next-level"],
  "status": "MONITORING",
  "work_items": [
    {
      "id": "item-1",
      "description": "Research authentication patterns",
      "type": "research",
      "issue": null,
      "pr_number": null,
      "wave": 1,
      "depends_on": [],
      "agent_id": "agent-research-001",
      "workspace": null,
      "workspace_type": "none",
      "branch": null,
      "status": "complete",
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:31:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T14:38:00Z",
      "result_summary": "Found 3 auth modules, JWT-based, tests in auth/__tests__/",
      "error": null
    },
    {
      "id": "item-2",
      "description": "Research API endpoint inventory",
      "type": "research",
      "issue": null,
      "pr_number": null,
      "wave": 1,
      "depends_on": [],
      "agent_id": "agent-research-002",
      "workspace": null,
      "workspace_type": "none",
      "branch": null,
      "status": "complete",
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:31:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T14:40:00Z",
      "result_summary": "14 endpoints across 4 routers, OpenAPI spec in docs/api.yaml",
      "error": null
    },
    {
      "id": "item-3",
      "description": "Implement user registration endpoint (#18)",
      "type": "implement",
      "issue": 18,
      "pr_number": null,
      "wave": 2,
      "depends_on": ["item-1"],
      "agent_id": "agent-impl-001",
      "workspace": "~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/wave-2-item-3",
      "workspace_type": "jj",
      "branch": "cos/18-user-registration",
      "status": "dispatched",
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:46:00Z",
      "completed_at": null,
      "result_summary": null,
      "error": null
    },
    {
      "id": "item-4",
      "description": "Implement JWT middleware (#12)",
      "type": "implement",
      "issue": 12,
      "pr_number": 57,
      "wave": 2,
      "depends_on": ["item-1"],
      "agent_id": "agent-impl-002",
      "workspace": "~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/wave-2-item-4",
      "workspace_type": "jj",
      "branch": "cos/12-jwt-middleware",
      "status": "complete",
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:46:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T15:10:00Z",
      "result_summary": "JWT middleware implemented with RS256, tests passing, PR #57 created",
      "error": null
    }
  ],
  "waves": [
    {
      "number": 1,
      "status": "complete",
      "items": ["item-1", "item-2"],
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:31:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T14:40:00Z"
    },
    {
      "number": 2,
      "status": "active",
      "items": ["item-3", "item-4"],
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:46:00Z",
      "completed_at": null
    }
  ],
  "agents": {
    "agent-research-001": {
      "name": "explore-auth-patterns",
      "type": "research",
      "status": "complete",
      "work_item_id": "item-1",
      "workspace_path": null,
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:31:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T14:38:00Z"
    },
    "agent-research-002": {
      "name": "inventory-api-endpoints",
      "type": "research",
      "status": "complete",
      "work_item_id": "item-2",
      "workspace_path": null,
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:31:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T14:40:00Z"
    },
    "agent-impl-001": {
      "name": "implement-user-registration",
      "type": "implement",
      "status": "running",
      "work_item_id": "item-3",
      "workspace_path": "~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/wave-2-item-3",
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:46:00Z",
      "completed_at": null
    },
    "agent-impl-002": {
      "name": "implement-jwt-middleware",
      "type": "implement",
      "status": "complete",
      "work_item_id": "item-4",
      "workspace_path": "~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/wave-2-item-4",
      "started_at": "2026-03-17T14:46:00Z",
      "completed_at": "2026-03-17T15:10:00Z"
    }
  },
  "quality_gates": {
    "conventions_loaded": true,
    "formatters": [],
    "linters": ["cargo clippy"],
    "test_command": "cargo test",
    "build_command": "cargo build",
    "lint_command": "cargo clippy"
  },
  "context": {
    "percentage": 42,
    "last_checked": "2026-03-17T15:10:00Z",
    "checkpoints": []
  }
}
```

---

## 11. Design Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| **Native session ID** (not custom format) | The session ID arrives from Claude Code via hook stdin. Generating our own (`cos-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS` or ISO timestamps) would create mismatches between directory names and the IDs hooks receive. |
| **Waves as array with `number` field** (not object keyed by number) | Arrays preserve insertion order, are easier to iterate, and support `jq` operations naturally. The `number` field provides explicit ordering. |
| **Agents as object keyed by agent-id** | Agent IDs are unique and used for lookups. Object keys give O(1) access and natural deduplication. |
| **Work items as array** | Work items are iterated, filtered, and sorted frequently. Arrays with unique `id` fields support this well. |
| **SCREAMING_CASE for session status** | Distinguishes session-level status from work-item-level status at a glance. Session status is a coarse-grained lifecycle marker. |
| **Lowercase for work item status** | Work item status changes frequently and appears in user-facing output. Lowercase is conventional for fine-grained state. |
| **`created_at` not `created`** | Consistent with `updated_at`, `started_at`, `completed_at`. The `_at` suffix is the codebase convention for timestamps. |
| **`vcs_type` at top level** | VCS type is a session-level concern, not nested under a `project` object. It is read frequently by dispatch logic. |
| **Centralized workspace path** | `~/.chief-of-staff/workspaces/` keeps all agent workspaces in a known location. Simplifies cleanup, status checking, and prevents polluting the project's parent directory. |
| **2 retries (3 total attempts)** | Balances recovery chances against wasted resources. Matches the convention in the skill and agents-templates specs. |
| **4 agents per wave (configurable)** | Default backpressure cap. Configurable via `config.json` `max_parallel_agents`. |
| **`context` object with `percentage`, `last_checked`, `checkpoints`** | Most complete tracking. Enables checkpoint history and staleness detection. |
